name: New York Department of State Licensee Search

agency.name: New York Department of State Division of Licensing Services

updateFrequency: unknown; the official page notes searches are limited to active licenses only
licenseTypesIncluded: New York Department of State active license records exposed by licensee search, including construction-adjacent license types such as home inspection where available
knownExclusions: New York contractor and home-improvement licensing is often local; this source entry does not represent every city or county contractor license.
The DOS search is limited to active licenses and is not a complete historical license source.
Skilled trades, NYC Department of Buildings licenses, local home-improvement licenses, and county consumer-affairs records require separate source entries.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Prefer official export options if discovered before lookup automation.
publicRecordsNotes: Official DOS active-license lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, local authorization, or inactive/historical credential does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official construction-specific bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for New York DOS licensee search. Future work should add separate entries for NYC DOB and major local contractor licensing sources if the project begins local-source coverage.
maintainerNotes: Keep active-only and local-licensing limitations prominent.
